# PuCellGroup

## Intent

- grouped rows
- settings group
- structured list

## Prefer When

- Use to group PuCell rows into a titled or visually bounded section.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for free-form card content; use PuCard.

## Import

```ts
import { PuCellGroup } from '@partner-up-dev/ui-web'
```

## Props

- `as`
- `title`
- `description`
- `surfaceLevel`
- `variant`
- `density`
- `dividers`
- `inset`

## Slots

- `default`
- `description`
- `footer`
- `header`
- `title`

## Events

- No emitted events extracted.

## Composition

- PuCell
- PuInlineNotice

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/display/PuCellGroup.story.vue`

- Plain
- Surface Dividers
- Header Footer
- Compact Inset
- No Dividers

## Types

- `PuCellGroupDensity`
- `PuCellGroupSurfaceLevel`
- `PuCellGroupVariant`

## Caveats

- Use surfaceLevel for neutral page/content depth and variant for plain, soft, outline, or solid treatment.
